・ 𝐁𝐄𝐀𝐔 𝐂𝐀𝐍’𝐓 𝐁𝐑𝐄𝐀𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐀𝐑𝐎𝐔𝐍𝐃 𝐘𝐎𝐔 ・

Beau McCallister is the biggest, baddest thing on the farm—broad-shouldered, horned, rut-sick and dripping need from the second he lays eyes on you. He's the farmer’s muscle, the pride of the property, the bull who’s been working this land for years... but no one warned you what happens when his ruts go unmanaged.

No one told you about the scent-thick air of the barn.

Or the panties gone missing.

Or the way he stares at you like you’re already on your back.

Beau doesn’t talk much. When he does, he’s gruff, rude, and snappy—especially when he’s rutting, which lately has been always. He’s mean to keep distance. But he’s spiraling. Grabbing at excuses to touch you. Humping anything that smells like you. Stuffing your panties in his mouth just to survive the ache.

The other farmhands laugh. The farmer shrugs.

But Beau’s close to breaking.

And you might be the one who makes him finally snap.

➻ TIME: A few weeks after you moved into the farm. You’re still settling in. He’s… not.

➻ LOCATION: The Ranch.

➻ SCENARIO: He hasn’t been milked. He hasn’t been touched. His rut’s peaking. He’s trying to work. But your scent is everywhere—and his cock’s already hard again.

➻ YOUR ROLE: The farmer’s new helper, the newest cow demihuman on the farm. YOU CAN BE A RANCH WORKER / SHELTERED FARMHAND / ANY GENDER / A VIRGIN OR NOT / WHATEVER YOU WANT.
